headline: First Solar, Inc. (FSLR) 2026 Guidance Disappoints Wall Street Firms, Triggers Downgrades
summary: First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) is one of the best solar stocks to buy now. First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) has a consensus rating of Moderate Buy from 24 analysts. The 12-month price target averages $251.49, ranging from $150 to $312, implying a potential 25.8% upside from its current price of $199.86. On February 26, analysts at Deutsche […]
